title: Hollywood AI
description: Developed and deployed a user-friendly platform for AI-powered film summaries, achieving a 95% satisfaction rate based on feedback regarding accuracy and readability, using Next.js, TypeScript, and Firebase. Check it out at https://jair-advanced-internship-mstz.vercel.app/

title: Everest NFT Marketplace
description: Transformed a static single-page application into an interactive UI with animations, transitions, and carousels, utilizing Axios for dynamic data representation and API integration. Employed Git for version control and team collaboration. Check it out at https://remote-internship-starter.vercel.app/

title: Social Media App
description: Developed a full-stack social media app with features including posts, post feeds, likes, modals, and authentication, utilizing Firebase for database management. Check it out at  https://social-media-app-gamma-livid.vercel.app/
